title: SolarEdge Technologies (SEDG) Q4 2024 Earnings Call Transcript
text: SolarEdge Technologies Q4 2024 Earnings Summary. Key Financial Results: Q4 2024 Performance: Total revenues: 196.2 million. Solar segment revenues: 189 million. Free cash flow: approximately 26 million (ahead of forecast). Non-GAAP gross margin: negative 39.5% (impacted by 87 million inventory write-downs). Regional Performance: CEO Shuki Nir reported that sell-through for Q4 was approximately 400 million. North America experienced a 17% quarter-over-quarter decline, while Europe remained roughly flat. The company anticipates European distributor inventory normalization by end of Q2 2025. Q1 2025 Guidance: Revenue range: 195 million to 215 million. Non-GAAP gross margin: 6% to 10%. Non-GAAP operating expenses: 98 million to 103 million. Expected positive free cash flow generation. Strategic Priorities: Management outlined four key initiatives: 1. Financial strengthening through cost reductions and inventory management. 2. Market share recovery via channel partnerships and competitive pricing. 3. Innovation acceleration including next-generation residential products launching Q4 2025. 4. U.S. manufacturing expansion with nearly 2,000 jobs created at Austin and Florida facilities. Notable Items: The company took a 115 million inventory write-down and restated 25.5 million in prior-period revenues related to a customer contract amendment.
